Action: Business Issuer creates a credential offer for unbound SD-JWT
Data:
- Credential type: unbound_example_sd_jwt
- Immediate issuance (deferred = false)
Expected Result: Issuer returns HTTP 200 with CredentialWithDeeplinkResponse and management_id

Action: Business Issuer retrieves initial credential status
Data:
- Management ID from offer
- GET request to /management/api/status/{id}

Action: Business Issuer updates credential status via state transition to CANCELLED
Expected Result: Issuer returns HTTP 200; status update succeeds

Action: Business Issuer retrieves updated credential status and confirms state change
Data:
- Management ID
- GET request to verify new status
Expected Result: Updated status differs from initial status; state transition confirmed
